name: Dice Guess
short_description: A minimalistic logic game where you predict the number the dice will display face up after a roll. Discover tricks and strategies to eliminate luck from the equation and ascend to become the ultimate dicempion.
detailed_description:
Roll the dice in your mind and try to figure out which number will end up on top when it stops. Remember, this isn't about luck even though I'm asking you to 'predict.' Every time you guess wrong, the game changes, making it a bit trickier. A crucial detail: the opposite sides of a die always add up to seven. Your goal? To become the ultimate 'dicempion' by carefully thinking through each move. Or just complete the game.

● 444 levels
● Minimalistic design
● Trains your brain? Quite possibly.



Oh, and if you find any tricks that make solving the puzzles easier, don't spread the word. Keep those secrets to yourself.
